channel.title: Report on Shriya
channel.description: Recent content in Report on Shriya

item.title: Challenges in Organic Agriculture in California: Summary
item.description: Summary of a statewide mixed-methods needs assessment of organic agriculture in California to inform institutional priorities of the UC ANR’s Organic Agriculture Institute.

item.title: Swachh Bharat: Industry Engagement
item.description: Contributor (Industry Profile Team) on a report examining the scope of private sector engagement in India’s Swachh Bharat sanitation initiative, produced by the Centre for Policy Research.

item.title: Assessing Tourism Infrastructure in Hyderabad, India
item.description: Master’s thesis examining tourism infrastructure in Hyderabad, India, analyzing gaps in accommodation, transport, and visitor services relative to the city’s heritage and cultural assets.
